rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: WMI Shadow Copy Deletion

rules.rule_text:
title: WMI Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 1c078d3c-749c-40ce-9400-c2dbad604764
status: experimental
description: "It\u2019s not uncommon for ransomware operators to leverage WMI to delete\
  \ volume shadows, \nsignificantly complicating the process for recovering access\
  \ to encrypted systems and files. \nIf you want to detect ransomware using WMI to\
  \ delete shadow copies, consider looking for \nwmic.exe execution with command lines\
  \ including shadowcopy or delete. Part of the RedCanary \n2024 Threat Detection\
  \ Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-management-instrumentation/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
- attack.impact
- attack.t1490
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \wmic.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - shadowcopy
    - delete
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
